title: RFC 9309 Matching, Failure Semantics, Caching, and Go Adapter · Systems Transfer
summary: An independent community information owner supplies a different origin, HTML structure, rate contract, accessibility need, resource ceiling, and injected failure and transfers rfc 9309 matching, failure semantics, caching, and go adapter into a changed conformance-tested robots decision engine. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of conformance-tested robots decision engine with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory,…
objectives: Fetch `/robots.txt` at the correct service origin with an honest stable product token and contact identity.
Apply RFC 9309 product-token matching, group merge, percent encoding, longest rule, and allow tie behavior.
Classify success, redirects, unavailable, unreachable, oversized, malformed, stale cache, and owner-stop states conservatively.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Robots Origin Agent
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Go team handles case 5086 during an owner-approved community information audit. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove RFC 9309 matching, response states, caching, Go package conformance, and extension restraint; every URL, body, tree, record, frontier transition, and report row retains causal identity; then change one content version, metadata, accessibility, resource, browser-service, or report condition without overclaiming. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Fetch `/robots.txt` at the correct service origin with an honest stable product token and contact identity.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Authorized site auditing and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Robots Origin Agent.

For Authorized site auditing and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Robots Origin Agent, keep Robots Origin Agent connected to executable Go authorization, URL, robots, response, tree, frontier, goroutine, report, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Robots Extension Policy
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-Go function headed "// Evidence: crawler-go-robots-extension-policy-4rudpi" that uses case 8917 to prove RFC 9309 matching, response states, caching, Go package conformance, and extension restraint. Return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not open sockets, resolve DNS, import x/net/html, goquery, Colly, or robotstxt, access host files, retain credentials, launch processes or unbounded goroutines, or claim native parser, race, load, accessibility, privacy, legal, container, restore, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Go 1.26.5, x/net 0.57.0, goquery 1.12.0, Colly 2.3.0, robotstxt 1.1.2, original fixtures, custom RoundTrippers, httptest servers, controlled DNS and browser-service environments, race and fuzz runs, subprocesses, inspected binaries and containers, accessibility review, capacity, backup, restore, rollback, legal review, and release gates.
